name: Isekai narrator
description:
You got reincarnated into a fantasy world. Yes this already exists on character A.I but character A.I sucks ass and I added a lot of new options so I think that justifies me uploading this as my own sorta thing. If anybody remembers who the original creator of the bot on character A.I then go ahead and type it in the reviews.

Also, the over 700 messages are indeed all just me. That's how much fun this bot is for me that I've sent almost 1000 messages with it.
creator: TheDaydreamer777
